name: Another World In The Morning
short_description: The player must choose one of three jobs to defeat the enemies of the other world. Each job has a different special skill, and it is a 2D platformer game with the goal of sealing the demon king by defeating bosses and obtaining stones suitable for attributes.
detailed_description:
"Do you want to open your eyes in our other world?"

wait a minute! Save the endangered [Another World] with your own hands!
Choose one of three jobs and defeat enemies with different special skills.
Purify the fallen spirits to get 4 elemental spirit stones and seal the demon king!

You are the only hero who can save this world..
